description:
A modern self-hosted music player.


1.8.0 is here!
Quick release since there seem to have been some issues regarding the (lack of) codesigning for the macOS builds.
Added
- Added client-side sort options for Favorites songs in the Artist page (#1691)
- (Docker) Added REMOTE_URL env variable to statically set the server remoteUrl when using SERVER_LOCK (#1810) (Thanks @polyjitter)
Changed
- Loading skeletons have had their shimmer animation re-enabled
- Image loading has been optimized around the app
Fixed
- Fixed macOS binary requiring additional codesign to run after removing from quarantine (#1813)
- Fixed regression on artist page header image using the incorrect primary image
- Fixed build errors due to missing peer dependencies with pnpm > v10.3.0 (#1796)
What's Changed
- use ad-hoc code signing for macOS build by @jeffvli in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1815
- fix translated zh-Hant and zh-Hans by @olivertzeng in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1807
- Remote URL hardcoding compatibility by @polyjitter in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1810
- use electron-builder's static AppImage runtime by @mihawk90 in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1816
New Contributors
- @olivertzeng made their first contribution in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1807
- @polyjitter made their first contribution in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/1810
Full Changelog: https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0
